hotel_name: Summit Namnang Courtyard & Spa - MG Marg

reviews.title: The real room condition different from pictures
reviews.text:
The room super dirty
The bed cover , blanket very disgusting 
Hot water only few minutes access 
Super bad hotel 
They only have few staff

reviews.title: Very bad experience
reviews.text: My experience was very very bad nothing was good at all plz don’t book this by seeing photos

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: I didn't like it at all.
reviews.response: Thanks for sharing your feedback. Sorry to hear that it didn’t meet your expectations. Hope you have a better experience next time!

reviews.title: Very unorganised hotel
reviews.text: Basic rooms, lift not working unless you complain, food cold and service too slow.  Have to remind staff 3/4 times before any action.  Very uncomfortable sitting in restaurant and only few tables.  Very steep hill, difficult to see in dark.  Restaurant very dirty with crumbs on floor and lots of insects. Not a place for hygiene in Restaurant.
reviews.response: Dear valued Guest, Namaste. Thankyou for your honest review. We assure you that the same will not reoccur and we will certainly work on creating better impressions and experiences. Thankyou for believing and choosing Summit Hotels & Resorts. Apologies and Best wishes, Team Summit.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Location was good
reviews.negatives:
Staffs there were very unwelcoming and sounded very rude. Total lack of communication from hotel about the documents required at the time of booking.
Food was not good at all and very less option. Amongst all, Maggie was the worst.  Really need to work on food quality.
Bathrooms were not up to mark. Shower handle was broken and the water flowed out from the tap so forcefully that was something that i experienced first time from a 4 star hotel

reviews.title: Worst experience
reviews.text: Worst ever experience of stay. After check in we found emepty whisky bottle in the room. The same was removed after our complaint. Staff is keast bothered our comfort.  During breakfast services are at its liwest. In spite of repeated reminders  no plates , no glass for water,  no referling of foodstuff etc. We would like to say no one should stay at such hotels.

reviews.title: Cheat and Worst hotel with small and stinky rooms
reviews.text: I had a good impression of Summit while booking and I booked a deluxe view room and at the time of booking mentioned with 4 year old kid. They gave a room in basement with no ventilation along with queen bed. How can a 3/4 star property even think of giving a queen size bed for 2 adults and 4 year old kid. At the time of booking everywhere they have mentioned king size bed. After fighting they provided me extra bed in that small room that after putting that no one can move also. Seems I paid 4K per night for Dharamshala. And the room was smelly with no ventilation to breathe. Never ever book this hotel and NOT at all recommended.
reviews.response:
Thank you for sharing your feedback. We sincerely regret that your experience did not meet your expectations. We take room allocation and guest comfort very seriously, and we apologize if the assigned room did not align with your booking requirements. Our team is committed to improving communication and ensuring that family accommodations are suitable and comfortable. We appreciate your comments as they help us enhance our services.
Regards, Summit Team.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: I had a very disappointing experience at this hotel. As soon as we entered, there was an unpleasant smell in the room. I had some urgent work to complete, but the Wi-Fi was not working. To make things worse, there was a power outage around midnight . My kids woke up and couldn’t sleep , which left them exhausted and cranky the whole next day. Overall, my trip was completely disrupted due to these issues. It was a horrible experience, and I wouldn’t recommend this hotel to others.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
You need to be a good Mountaineer to walk out and get into this hotel. Hotel gate to anywhere around a Kilometer radius is a very stiff climbs. 
or you will have to wait for 20 to 30 mins for hotel staff to get you a taxi.

Choose Summit Denzong instead for few hundred more. It's much better placed. While similar ambience and service are available around MG Road at half the price.

reviews.text: Facilities inside rooms are not adequate enough, though it was a very big room.

Thank you for sharing your feedback about your stay. We're glad to hear that the room size met your expectations, but we're sorry to learn that the facilities inside the room were not adequate.

We strive to provide our guests with comfortable and well-equipped rooms, so your comments will be shared with our team to help us improve the in-room amenities and facilities. We aim to ensure that all guests have a pleasant and convenient experience during their stay.

reviews.title: Not good as expected
reviews.text:
As me expect this is not that good because first staff was not that nice as other hotels have. Secondly the location was vey bad because i ver very strip road was there to climb or walk u can say to go to hotel and hotel to mg marg only young people can go to that place .
Location was the most worst thing i experience. There was no lighting present on the road as we go towards the hotel bad Location.
I don't recommend older people to stay here, also u can see any other option also

reviews.title: Could have been better
reviews.text:
Having staying at Summit resorts earlier, this was a let down honestly. The location is not conducive to head out alone or with family as it dark and uphill on a broken road.
Breakfast buffet is just about decent which hardly changed across our 3 day's stay.
Staff is polite although service needs an upgrade in terms of promptness.
Spa facility wasn't available across the stay period and there was some or the other issues with the lift.
Overall, wouldn't be willing to come back to this particular Summit property. Although, I do hope that they improve and take note of the grievances.
reviews.response: Thank you for sharing your experience. Having stayed at Summit resorts before, this particular stay was a letdown. The location wasn’t ideal for heading out alone or with family, as it was dark and uphill on a broken road. The breakfast buffet remained the same throughout our 3-day stay and was just about decent. While the staff was polite, service could be more prompt. The spa facility was unavailable during our stay, and there were recurring issues with the lift. Overall, I wouldn’t be keen to return to this specific Summit property, but I do hope they take note of these concerns and improve.

reviews.title: Good hotel but not worth the money
reviews.text:
Hotel room is very clean and well maintained. Bathroom is very clean but no exhaust fan. So if you go to shit out you need to leave it for sometime before the bad smell goes out before next one can use. I wonder how such a small point these hotel people can miss?
Room is comfortable and staff is friendly. Food in the restaurant is nice. However still do not think the amount they charged makes a sense. (paid almost 10 thousand per night for a family room which i think too much). The location is really near to main market but the problem is you need to walk up the hill to reach the market and its not very convinient. Also hotel doesnt provide any drop/pickup facility.  The view of the valley from the hotel room is very good though.
reviews.response: Dear valued Guest, Namaste. Thankyou for your honest review. reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Approch road to hotel was bad. Convenc provided from hotel to MG Road was costly.

reviews.title: Budget friendly hotel with limited facilities
reviews.text:
I recently visited this hotel.  I would like to highlight some of the pros and cons about this hotel.
Pros: Hotel is near to MG road hardly 5-7 mins walk distance.
Staff behaviour is good.
They can avail taxi for you if you ask them.
Cons: 1. The hotel is situated at a very steep slop, so once you start walking it's difficult to walk upon but while coming back you will feel like someone is pushing you.
2. Rooms are not big and spacious and that too with dirty curtains.
3. The worst part of this hotel is Bathroom. It is  really a smaller one with dirty curtain, no exhaust fan, and they offer you shower gel to take bath but without loofa. When I requested them to either provide me loofa or soap to take bath, they said "sry sir, we don't provide soap, shower is there, you can take bath with it".
I mean you have to take bath with shower gel by applying it onto your full body with bare hands. They are simply wasting their shower gel.
4.I have got a complimentary spa while I made my booking through Agoda but they didn't turn up of their own. When I enquired them about it, they said they don't have therepist so they can't provide me this facility.
So, this is my opinion and I know that while making any booking, people used to see reviews given by the tourist  who have visited earlier that is why I am giving my time for this, I don't want that you waste your hard earned money like anything.
Thank you

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text:
Nice property 
Pros-: Beautiful amazing view.
Big room , All facilities including heater in room , Cleanliness was good. Prompt housekeeping. Good location close to MG Road
Cons-: Very sloppy approach road with no Light ( very dark) .
Staff prompt to provide all services but could be more hospitable .
Buffet little expensive.
reviews.response:
Thank you for your valuable feedback. We’re pleased you enjoyed the beautiful views, spacious rooms, and prompt housekeeping, along with our convenient location. We appreciate your observations about the approach road lighting and hospitality, and we are continuously working to enhance these aspects for a better guest experience. Your feedback is important to us, and we look forward to welcoming you again.
Regards, Summit Team.

reviews.title: Hotel and Staff is good but food is very poor
reviews.text: Hotel and Staff is good but Buffet Breakfast and Buffet Dinner food is very poor.
reviews.response: Thanks for your feedback! It's great to hear that the hotel and staff were good, but disappointing that the food didn’t meet expectations. Hopefully, they improve the buffet quality in the future!

reviews.title: Without food? It's awesome.
reviews.text: Food was not good. Quantity was too low. But cleanliness is 10 out of 10.
reviews.response:
Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We're glad to hear that you found the cleanliness of the hotel to be excellent. However, we're sorry to learn that you were disappointed with the food quality and quantity.

Your comments about the food will be shared with our culinary team so we can address these concerns and work towards improving our offerings. Providing quality meals in satisfactory portions is important to us, and we will take steps to enhance our guests' dining experiences.

We appreciate your candid review and hope you might consider staying with us again in the future. We will work hard to make your next visit more satisfying in terms of both food and cleanliness. Thank you again for your feedback.

Rooms are spacious and provide good service with some delays because of a shortage of staff, and lack some amenities like fans, and lights.
apart from that food was good.
Avoid taking this hotel for elderly ppl since the hotel is in an isolated location on a slope.

reviews.title: Budget friendly Hotel.
reviews.text: Summit Namnang is basically a budget friendly hotel located appx 10 min walk from MG marg. Road leading to hotel is next to Big Bazaar which you will obviously miss (if you are following google maps)because it is not demarcated either by big board or any thing else. Road is very narrow. Stay wise hotel is good with good view. Staff is very courteous and helpful. They will call you before every meal just to check of you want to have it inside their restaurant (Nathu La). They need to change their mattresses they are the only spoiler. I will just say Go for this hotel if you are staying in Gangtok.
reviews.response:
Dear Guest,

Namaste!

Thank you for choosing to stay with Summit Hotels and Resorts and for reviewing us in this forum.

We are glad to be receiving a positive review for us, We look forward in hosting you better in near future again.

Regards,
Unit Manager.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Good Location Good Food
reviews.response: Thank you for sharing your review! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the good location and good food during your stay. It's great to know that you had an excellent experience overall. We appreciate your positive feedback and hope to welcome you back for another wonderful stay in the future!

reviews.title: Peaceful Location
reviews.text: Thank you to the staff and manager of the Hotel who were polite and helpful . The room was clean and large with a  breathtaking view of the valley below. The hotel is close to the tourist  area - MG Road . 8 mins on a bike . Will visit again.
reviews.response:
Thank you for sharing your review! We're delighted to hear that you had a peaceful stay and enjoyed the large, clean room with breathtaking views of the valley. It's wonderful to know that our staff and manager were polite and helpful, contributing to your positive experience.

We're glad that you found the location convenient, with close proximity to MG Road and other tourist areas. Thank you for expressing your intention to visit again. We look forward to welcoming you back for another memorable stay in the future!

reviews.title: Comfortable stay
reviews.text: Well, the property is in a great location. A bit away from M.G Marg, but it us in walking distance. You can see ropeway from your room and an entire gangtok city in a clear night. What I don't likd is that  they didn't welcome us properlu. Like we were supposed to receive welcome drinks, but they didn't send that. Also, our 45 min free spa therapy was reduced to 30 mins, that too after a few reminders. A few staffs are great, but not all. The managers should be more warm in nature. But the stay was beautiful Nx other things went smoothly.
reviews.response: Dear Valued Guest, Namaste, Thankyou for your honest review and the inconveniences that you had to go through during your stay is deeply regretted. We regret to have left this impression on you, We will assure you that all the areas highlighted above will be worked upon and make certain that such situations will never occur again. Apologies and best wishes, Team Summit.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The room is very nice and cleaned with all facilities except wifi they have poor signal.wide range of breakfast in buffet. Location  is very far from mall road need cab to visit mall road otherwise everything thing is perfect.

reviews.title: Romantic and peaceful escape
reviews.positives: Summit Namnang was the perfect choice for our weekend getaway. The ambiance is warm and cozy, and the views are simply breathtaking. The staff arranged a candlelight dinner for us and went out of their way to make our stay special. We loved the spa services as well. Will definitely return.

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.text: Nice stay with summit Namnang. Right there on MG Marg and clean rooms with ample space. Breakfast could be better.
reviews.response: Thanks for sharing your experience! Glad you enjoyed the stay and the location. Hopefully, the breakfast improves next time! 😊

reviews.title: Feels like home
reviews.positives: The service was top-notch—friendly and professional. Rooms were neat, well-maintained, and had all the amenities. Their breakfast spread was a treat every morning.

reviews.title: Great place
reviews.text: The property is good, the rooms and big and the service is great. Good value for money
reviews.response: Sounds like a solid stay! Spacious rooms and great service always make a difference. 😊

reviews.title: Perfect stay in Gangtok
reviews.positives: Loved the warm welcome and prompt service. The rooms were spacious with beautiful views, and every meal we had was fresh and flavorful. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Great Stay

reviews.positives: The staff at Summit Namnang Gangtok went above and beyond to make our stay comfortable. The rooms were spotless and cozy, and the food was absolutely delicious—especially the local dishes.

reviews.title: Spacious family suite with view
reviews.text:
The room was spacious with great view of the valley and ropeway.  
The food in the restaurant was ok. Their thukpa is good and worth a try...

The spirit will be well maintained and will certainly work on providing exceptional services in the future. Thankyou for believing and choosing Summit Hotels & Resorts. We look forward to welcome you back in time. Best wishes, Team Summit.

reviews.response: Dear Valued Guest, Namaste, Thankyou for the review. We would love to be at your service in the future again. Thankyou for believing and choosing Summit Hotels& Resorts. Best wishes, Team Summit.

reviews.title: Excellent property
reviews.text:
Compact and well-maintained property in a great location (easily accessible from MG Road & Deorali) with basic business facilities. Food was excellent too & best of all was the wonderful service staff.

Two 'criticisms' - the access lane towards the hotel is narrow and dark, the wifi connectivity was poor (though this is a general situation in Gangtok)
reviews.response: Dear Valued Guest, Your review is highly appreciated, Thankyou for acknowledging our hotel. We are glad that you had a good stay with us and would love to welcome you back any day. Thankyou for choosing and trusting Summit Hotels & Resorts. Best Wishes, Team Summit.

reviews.title: Caring Staff
reviews.text: Room was spacious and neat and it could have been better if the furniture were polished and clean. The staff were kind enough to pack us wholesome breakfast at 6 am to help us to leave Gangtok early since we have to reach Bagdogra in time for our flight. They have a cute garden and open bar adorned by a Lion statue and an angel with fountain.

reviews.title: Great Hotel very near to MG Road
reviews.text:
I stayed with my family. We were 2 adults & 2 kids. Our room had 2 double beds and great view of city, specially in the night.

The hotel is very near to MG Road. It used to take us around 15 minutes by walk. The walk is uphill, but that is the case in Gangtok. Advantage is while returning, you need to walk downhill : )

Food was good with nice breakfast spread. The hotel has a Spa and a Bar which has very nice view specially in the night.

This is one of the rare hotels in Gangtok that has a courtyard outside hotel where you can walk and kids can play.

I will surely recommend it to one and all
reviews.response:
Thank you for your detailed and positive review! We are delighted to hear that you and your family had a great stay with us and enjoyed the room with its stunning city views, especially at night.

It's wonderful to know that you appreciated our proximity to MG Road and found the walk manageable and even enjoyable on the downhill return. We're pleased that you enjoyed our food, breakfast spread, spa, and bar with its lovely nighttime views.

We’re especially glad that your family enjoyed the courtyard where the kids could play. Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we look forward to welcoming you and your family back for another memorable stay.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very good hotel at reasonable price
reviews.response: Thank you for your review! We're glad you found our hotel to be very good and reasonably priced. We hope to welcome you back soon!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very good experience with hotel staff and also rooms are spacious for accommodating young kids with parents.
reviews.response:
Thank you for sharing your review! We're delighted to hear that you had a very good experience with our hotel staff and found the rooms spacious enough to accommodate your family comfortably. We strive to provide an excellent experience for all our guests, and it's great to know that our accommodations suited your needs.

We appreciate your feedback and hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you and your family back for another enjoyable stay in the future!

reviews.title: Good experience
reviews.text: The family duplex room was fabulous. Great view from the room window. Good service. Location is a bit difficult to reach. Very steep slope from the road leads to the hotel & that slope is not well maintained. Very near to MG Marg. Overall very good experience.
reviews.response: Dear Valued Guest, Namaste. Thankyou for the review. We are glad to learn that the rooms were upto the standard and to your expectations. We also believe that you had a comfortable stay with us. The issue highlighted above will be worked upon. Thankyou for believing and choosing Summit Hotels & Resorts. Best wishes, Team Summit.

reviews.title: Really well kept!
reviews.text: I loved my stay at Summit Namnag, it has an amazing view of Gangtok ropeway and the mountains. The room was spotless, cheap food and drinks.
reviews.response: Dear Valued Guest, Namaste and thankyou so much for your generous review. It is highly appreciated. We are pleased to learn that you had an exceptional stay with us.  Our only goal is to provide our guests with only the best and we have a success in this case. The team assures you that the spirit will be well maintained and at all times be at our best behavior and provide the best hospitality services to all our guests. We would love to welcome you back in the future. Thankyou for believing and choosing summit Hotels & Resorts. Best wishes, Team Summit.

reviews.title: Amazing stay at Summit Namnang Courtyard and Spa
reviews.text: We had booked the Premium Room with Mountain view and the experience was amazing.  The room had huge windows and we could literally watch the clouds float by. The staff were also very good and helpful. Food was amazing. Overall our stay was just perfect.

reviews.title: Pathetic.
reviews.positives: Except the view from the attic room nothing was good.
reviews.negatives: Hotel management , food and room service . Even a hospital canteen has a better service.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Travelled in September 2025.good hotel.about 600mtrs from mgroad. Cabs are easily available till night.charges are rs 200 one way.despite being  close to mg road it is peaceful as it is on separate road  with steep slope and a lot of parking space almost all the amneties are available. Charges for food as per menu are littlebit on higher side..staff  is young , professional,
.always smiling and helpful.view from new block is beautiful. Value for money hotel.

reviews.title: Spoiled trip
reviews.positives: Nothing worst in worst

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: Our stay was very comfortable and memorable

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The chef is good but food is being served very carelessly they don't bother if it's not HOT

reviews.title: Best view with spacious rooms.
reviews.text:
We stayed for a night. Took 2 rooms. both rooms were clean and well maintained. In case of any worthy and reasonable demand, the staff was quite helpful and provided us with that. 
One issue I felt that was there.. was that, there's no lift. But most of the hotels in hilly regions don't have. We stayed at 3 floor and it became little difficult to come down for dinner. Rest it all good 👍
reviews.response: Thank you for sharing your experience! Glad to hear you enjoyed the spacious rooms and helpful staff. The lack of a lift in hilly regions can be a bit of a challenge, but it sounds like everything else made up for it. 😊👍

reviews.title: A Comfortable Stay But An Average Experience
reviews.positives: The hotel was clean. The rooms were spacious and the beds were comfy. The location was good and was only a short walk away from MG Marg and Lal Bazaar.
reviews.negatives:
The reception staff could have been more responsive.
 The food could have been better. 
The bathrooms were stinky due to use of recycled water and should have bathroom fresheners.

reviews.title: Excellent stay , Value for money
reviews.text: Stay for 2days. Very well maintained,  cleaned hotel.  Staff behavior  is very polite. Own restaurant named Nathula is fantastic though price is Lil bit high. Walkable distance from MG Marg.
reviews.response: Sounds like a great experience! A clean and well-maintained hotel with polite staff always makes a stay worthwhile. Even if the restaurant prices were a bit high, it's good to know the food was fantastic! 😊

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The property offered good facilities. The Staffs were perfect , always helpful and accommodating. It was very clean and the beds were really comfortable. The food in the hotel was also good . Shopping centre is located very nearby along with Mg Marg being within 2kms. Overall , highly recommended stay
reviews.response: Thank you for an exceptional experience! The property offered great facilities, and the staff were perfect—always helpful and accommodating. Everything was very clean, and the beds were really comfortable. The food at the hotel was also good. The shopping center was conveniently nearby, and MG Marg was within 2 km. Overall, a highly recommended stay!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Very good

reviews.title: Awesome Stay at summit Namnang
reviews.text:
Rooms are very spacious along with their bathrooms.  Food is good.
Staff is really polite and possess good behaviour.  I would like to appreciate here Sujal and Lucky.❤️😊
I booked premium room with view and another room was Family Suite.
I got a clear view of Kanchenjunga from our rooms. 
Location is just 5 mins walking distance to MG ROAD. Do not get fooled by taxi drivers that it is long way unless you have someone who can’t walk because it is a little steep to walk.
I totally recommend for a cozy stay in Summit Namnang.

Thanks.
reviews.response: Thank you for sharing your wonderful experience at Summit Namnang! We're thrilled that you enjoyed the spacious rooms, good food, and the polite staff—especially Sujal and Lucky. It's great to know that the clear view of Kanchenjunga and the convenient location near MG Road added to your stay. Your tip about the short walk is very helpful for future guests. We truly appreciate your recommendation and look forward to welcoming you back for another cozy stay!

We apologize if you found the food menu to be limited. We'll review our culinary offerings to ensure we provide a variety of options to suit different tastes and preferences.

Your feedback is important to us and helps us improve our services. We appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts, and we hope to welcome you back in the future for an even better experience. Thank you!

reviews.title: Great place to stay!
reviews.text: The staff is great. The in house food is excellent. Rooms are spacious and clean including toilets. Only concern is the long walk uphill to MG Marg if you are not used to long uphill walks. Having said that, I must say that taxis are easily available in front of Big Bazaar which is just a minute’s walk from the hotel.
reviews.response:

Unit Manager.

reviews.title: Comfortable stay for a family with great scenic views!
reviews.positives: Very comfortable accommodation, great food and excellent view of Kanchenjunga from the room!
reviews.negatives: Access road is not great but the quality of accommodation and food make up for it!

reviews.title: Exceptional hospitality and stunning views - A true gem in Gangtok!
reviews.text:
Pros: Spacious Family Duplex with Kanchenjunga views, great buffet, beautiful open-air cafe bar, and an incredible team. Just a 12-minute walk to MG Marg.

Review: We had an amazing stay! The rooms were spacious, cosy & comfortable with stunning view of the Himalayas, but what truly sets this hotel apart is the service. The entire team—including Bimla, Sharmista, Babita, Rithik, Pema, Alisha, Avinash, and Suman—was incredibly prompt and helpful. A massive thank you to the Manager, Mr. Anish Mehra, who went above and beyond when my daughter was unwell, and even coordinated with their group hotel in Darjeeling to ensure a seamless transition. Outstanding hospitality. We will definitely be back!

Cons: The final 150m approach road is a bit rustic, and the original block doesn't have a lift, but neither detracted from a wonderful stay.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The staff

The entire team—including Bimla, Sharmista, Babita, Rithik, Pema, Alisha, Avinash, and Suman—was incredibly prompt and helpful. A massive thank you to the Manager, Mr. Anish Mehra, who went above and beyond when my daughter was unwell, and even coordinated with their group hotel in Darjeeling to ensure a seamless transition. reviews.text: Great stay with polite and helpful staff. Conveniently located from MG Marg and shopping places and car and bike rentals nearby. Great view from the room overlooking the valleys and the ropeway cable car.
reviews.response: Thank you for a wonderful stay! The staff were polite and helpful, making the experience even better. The hotel is conveniently located near MG Marg, shopping areas, and car and bike rentals. The room offered a great view overlooking the valleys and the ropeway cable car. Truly a bang for the buck!

reviews.title: Gangtok Trip
reviews.text: One of the finest property to stay in Gangtok.location is pretty close to MG Marg.The view from the rooms are breathtaking.Excellant Staff behaviour and service.Highly recommended
reviews.response:
Thank you for your wonderful review. We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed your stay and found our property to be one of the finest in Gangtok. It's great to know that our location, close to MG Marg, was convenient for you and that you enjoyed the breathtaking views from your room.

We are especially pleased to hear your compliments about our staff's behavior and service. Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we look forward to welcoming you back for another excellent stay. Thank you for choosing us for your Gangtok trip!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Beautiful ambiance, courteous staff, and a relaxing experience overall Loved the peaceful vibe, great food, and exceptional hospitality.

reviews.title: Hotel with a view and very comfortable stay
reviews.text: Stayed in this hotel for 3 nights in January 2022 with family and old parents. First highlight of the hotel is its location and apprearance followed by a very friendly staff. Worth mentioning the exytraordinary support received from the Manager Mr. Ashish Tamang. Food is delicious however the choise available is limited. Particualt attention was given to cleanliness and hastle free stay. The only issue we faced was with the availability of water. The bathroom section of the hotel definitely need attention as most of the time we were strucggling with the availability of water in the bathroom and especially availability of hot water when needed. Rest our stay was very comfortable and pleasant. 5 stars no doubt.
reviews.response: Dear Valued Guest, Namaste and thankyou for your 5 star review. We are delighted to learn that you had a comfortable stay with us. And we sincerely apologize for the inconveniences highlighted above that you had to face during your stay. We assure you that it has been paid attention to and has been worked upon wholeheartedly. We would love to provide you with even better experiences in the future. Thankyou for believing and choosing Summit Hotels & Resorts. Best wishes, Team Summit.

Also it is just  a 10 mins walk from the MG Marg.

reviews.title: Best Place to stay for Gangtok Visitors
reviews.text: Near to MG Road Gangtok, Best View with Premium Room, Superb Food, Excellent Hospitable Staff.
reviews.response:
Thank you for sharing your review! We're thrilled to hear that you found our hotel to be the best place to stay for Gangtok visitors. It's great to know that you enjoyed the convenient location near MG Road, the stunning views from the premium room, superb food, and the excellent hospitality provided by our staff.

Your positive feedback is greatly appreciated, and we hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back for another wonderful stay in the future! Thank you for recommending us to other visitors to Gangtok.

reviews.title: Nice Hotel back side of Reliance smart bazaar.
reviews.text:
it is on off road, at the back side of Reliance Smart Bazaar. hotel rooms are quite spacious.. it is a 3 star property as per my opinion. Restaurant and Spa services are there in the hotel. 
for a solo traveller or groups it is convenient. for family i would recommend if you are travelling or hiring taxi everytime. 
Main Market is 10-15 mins walk from the hotel...
reviews.response: Dear Valued Guest, Namaste. Thankyou for the review and Thankyou for believing and choosing Summit Hotels & Resorts. Best wishes, Team Summit.

reviews.title: Awesome stay
reviews.text: Staff is very supportive and cleanliness is top notch.
reviews.response: Dear Valued Guest, Thankyou for your generous review, Summit Hotels and Resorts assure to always provide exceptional services to all our guests. Thankyou for believing in us. Best wishes, Team Summit.
